creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Port science/paraview (V2.4.4 at the moment) does not compile properly and dies when it comes to png-related stuff. The port 'png' is already installed and up to date. The missing png.h mentioned in the error is here:

# find /usr/local/ -name png.h -ls
448842        0 lrwxr-xr-x    1 root             wheel                  12 Apr 23 16:49 /usr/local/include/png.h -> libpng/png.h
448840      284 -r--r--r--    1 root             wheel              145052 Apr 23 16:49 /usr/local/include/libpng/png.h


[ 89%] Building CXX object GUI/Widgets/CMakeFiles/KWWidgets.dir/vtkKWResourceUtilities.o
In file included from /usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:20:
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/VTK/Utilities/vtk_png.h:21:18: png.h: No such file or directory
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx: In static member function `static int vtkKWResourceUtilities::ReadPNGImage(const char*, int*, int*, int*, unsigned char**)':
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:81: error: `png_sig_cmp' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:91: error: `png_structp' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:91: error: expected `;' before "png_ptr"
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:93: error: `png_ptr' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:100: error: `png_infop' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:100: error: expected `;' before "info_ptr"
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:101: error: `info_ptr' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:104: error: `png_ptr' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:104: error: `png_infopp' was not declared in this scope
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:104: error: expected `)' before numeric constant
/usr/ports/science/paraview/work/paraview-2.4.4/GUI/Widgets/vtkKWResourceUtilities.cxx:104: error: `png_destroy_read_struct' was not declared in this scope

How-To-Repeat: Try building ports/science/paraview
